inputs.label: Population Size
inputs.businessContext: Total number of items in the population to be audited.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of items in the population to be audited.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der zu prüfenden Elemente in der Grundgesamtheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'éléments dans la population à auditer.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de elementos en la población a auditar.

inputs.label: Z-Score
inputs.businessContext: Z-score corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Z-score corresponding to the desired confidence level (e.g., 1.96 for 95%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen güven düzeyine karşılık gelen Z-skoru (örneğin, %95 için 1,96).
businessContext_i18n.de: Z-Wert entsprechend dem gewünschten Konfidenzniveau (z. B. 1,96 für 95 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score Z correspondant au niveau de confiance souhaité (ex. 1,96 pour 95 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación Z correspondiente al nivel de confianza deseado (ej. 1.96 para 95%).

inputs.label: Margin of Error
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable margin of error as a percentage (e.g., 5 for ±5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable margin of error as a percentage (e.g., 5 for ±5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yüzde olarak kabul edilebilir hata payı (örneğin, ±%5 için 5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Akzeptable Fehlermarge in Prozent (z. B. 5 für ±5 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Marge d'erreur acceptable en pourcentage (ex. 5 pour ±5 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Margen de error aceptable como porcentaje (ej. 5 para ±5%).

inputs.label: Estimated Proportion
inputs.businessContext: Estimated proportion of an attribute present in the population (0 to 1). Use 0.5 for maximum variability.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated proportion of an attribute present in the population (0 to 1). Use 0.5 for maximum variability.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Popülasyonda bulunan bir özelliğin tahmini oranı (0 ile 1 arası). Maksimum değişkenlik için 0,5 kullanın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Anteil eines Attributs in der Grundgesamtheit (0 bis 1). Verwenden Sie 0,5 für maximale Variabilität.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Proportion estimée d'un attribut présent dans la population (0 à 1). Utilisez 0,5 pour une variabilité maximale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Proporción estimada de un atributo presente en la población (0 a 1). Use 0.5 para máxima variabilidad.

inputs.label: Expected Response Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected response rate to adjust sample size for non-response (e.g., 80 for 80%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected response rate to adjust sample size for non-response (e.g., 80 for 80%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yanıtsızlık için örneklem büyüklüğünü ayarlamak üzere beklenen yanıt oranı (örneğin, %80 için 80).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete Rücklaufquote zur Anpassung der Stichprobengröße an Nichtbeantwortung (z. B. 80 für 80 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de réponse attendu pour ajuster la taille de l'échantillon en cas de non-réponse (ex. 80 pour 80 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de respuesta esperada para ajustar el tamaño de la muestra por falta de respuesta (ej. 80 para 80%).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
